servers.description: Stage (Requires specific access for Staging Envirnoment)

get.description: Get product information for a specific sku

parameters.name: sku
parameters.description: sku to get product information

get.description:
Search wheel products information using filters.
Returns summarized list of wheel products matching search criteria

parameters.name: facetCount
parameters.description: This parameter is to control the number of buckets for the facet's retrieved.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description:
This parameter controls the direction of the data sort. This parameter is only applicable
when used in combination with the sortField parameter

parameters.name: sortField
parameters.description:
The name of the field to sort the data on. The allowed valus for sorting are \:
brand | popularity | price | status | style | styleNumber

parameters.name: priceType
parameters.description:
An string holding the additional pricing types to be included in the response. This is an optional parameter.
When used additional parameter becomes required: company. For service user, customer parameter is available to pass a customer number and override the default.
For non-service user or when the customer is not provided, it's auto-populated with their own customer number.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description:
This value determines the sales org to be used.
* 1000 (CAD | USD)
* 1500 (USD)
* 4000 (CAD)
* 5000 (AUD)
* 6000 (GBP)
* 7000 (EUR)

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: This is a special parameter which is required only for service accounts. The parameter is used to override the customer number passed to the backend. When not provided or if the user is non-service user then it's auto-populated with their customer number.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Free text string to filter results

parameters.name: sku
parameters.description: sku search to filter the results. This property also support multiple inputs in the query parameter.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
To list what additional information to be included in response.
By default neither inventory nor price will be returned

parameters.name: inventoryOrderType
parameters.description:
The inventory type code for the wheel:
**Note:**  It is multi-value Query Parameter.

- **BL** - blank wheels
- **BW** - blowout price wheel
- **CF** - configurable wheel
- **CS** - custom made wheel
- **DB** - drilled from blank wheel
- **IT** - import or international wheel
- **N2** - discontinued wheel
- **NW** - new wheel
- **RG** - regional sales wheel
- **ST** - standard stocking wheel

parameters.name: currencyCode
parameters.description: Currency code to return pricing info

parameters.name: vehicleYear
parameters.description: The vehicle year

parameters.name: vehicleMake
parameters.description: The vehicle make

parameters.name: vehicleModel
parameters.description: The vehicle model

parameters.name: vehicleSubModel
parameters.description: The vehicle sub-model

parameters.name: warehouse
parameters.description: Preferred warehouse

parameters.name: minQuantity
parameters.description: Only warehouses and skus with at least the minimum quantity will be included in the results

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: Filter wheels by brand

parameters.name: boltPattern
parameters.description: Filter wheels by bolt pattern (metric)

parameters.name: finish
parameters.description: Filter wheels by finish

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: Filter wheels by diameter

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Filter wheels by width

parameters.name: minOffset
parameters.description: Filter wheels by offset greater than or equal to this offset

parameters.name: maxOffset
parameters.description: Filter wheels by offset less than or equal to this offset

parameters.name: offsetType
parameters.description: Filter wheels by offset type

parameters.name: centerbore
parameters.description: Filter wheels by centerbore

parameters.name: includeStaggered
parameters.description:
Include staggered wheel fitment. ( The vehicle needs to be selected for the staggered response. )
**Note:** Staggered results are paginated based on models matching with the given search criteria

parameters.name: includeLifted
parameters.description: Include lifted wheel fitment

parameters.name: singleDrillOnly
parameters.description: Filter wheels by single drill only

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The paginated page results to return

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The page size for each page

parameters.name: availabilityType
parameters.description: Filter wheels by availability type

parameters.name: realTimeInventory
parameters.description: If search should consider inventory in real time (higher response latency)

BearerAuth.description:
- To use Wheel Pros Vehicle APIs the user must be authenticated by using their username and password
- The request must contain the Authorization Bearer header with valid tokenString to access the APIs

**CURL for sample request**
```
curl --location --request GET 'https://dev.api.wheelpros.com/products/v1/search/wheel?filter=Black Rhino&currencyCode=USD&vehicleYear=2020&vehicleMake=Audi&vehicleModel=S5&vehicleSubModel=quattro&warehouse=reprehe&minQuantity=2&brand=Black Rhino&boltPattern=5x114.3&finish=BLACK&diameter=19&width=vel&minOffset=35&maxOffset=35&offsetType=RANGE&centerbore=76.2&includeStaggered=true&includeLifted=true&singleDrillOnly=laborum est adipisicing proident&page=2&pageSize=25&critera&availabilityType=AVAILABLE&realTimeInventory=true' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer tokenString'
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
```

unauthorized.description: This status code will be thrown when the auth token is invalid.

value.Message: User is not authorized to access this resource with an explicit deny

systemError.description: This status code will be thrown when un-expected system error occurs

validationError.description: This status code will be thrown when the request validation fails
